scripts.build:mobile: ui5 build self-contained --config=ui5.yaml --clean-dest --dest dist && npm run copy:framework
scripts.copy:framework: mkdir -p dist/resources && cp -r ~/.ui5/framework/packages/@openui5/sap.ui.core/1.120.18/src/. dist/resources && cp -r ~/.ui5/framework/packages/@openui5/sap.m/1.120.18/src/. dist/resources && cp -r ~/.ui5/framework/packages/@openui5/sap.ui.layout/1.120.18/src/. dist/resources && cp -r ~/.ui5/framework/packages/@openui5/sap.ui.unified/1.120.18/src/. dist/resources
scripts.cordova:init: cd mobile && cordova platform add android ios
scripts.cordova:prepare: cp config.xml mobile/config.xml && mkdir -p mobile/res && cp -r res/. mobile/res/ && cp mobile/google-services.json mobile/platforms/android/app/google-services.json 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p mobile/platforms/android/app/src/main/res/xml && cp res/android/network_security_config.xml mobile/platforms/android/app/src/main/res/xml/network_security_config.xml && rm -rf mobile/www && cp -r dist mobile/www && npm run patch:manifest
scripts.patch:manifest: python3 -c "import re; f=open('mobile/platforms/android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml','r+'); c=f.read(); c=re.sub(r' android:usesCleartextTraffic=\"true\"','',c); c=re.sub(r' android:networkSecurityConfig=\"@xml/network_security_config\"','',c); c=c.replace('<application','<application android:usesCleartextTraffic=\"true\" android:networkSecurityConfig=\"@xml/network_security_config\"',1); f.seek(0); f.write(c); f.truncate(); f.close()"
scripts.mobile:apk: npm run build:mobile && npm run cordova:prepare && npm run cordova:build:android
scripts.mobile:ipa: npm run build:mobile && npm run cordova:prepare && npm run cordova:build:ios
